REGYBOX_STATE.description: Created automatically to remember which classes have already been handled.

PHPSESSID.description: Copy this cookie value from regybox.pt developer tools so the Worker can sign in.

REGYBOX_USER.description: Copy this cookie value from regybox.pt developer tools so the Worker can identify your account.

CALENDAR_URL.description: Paste the secret iCal address from your Google Calendar settings.

CLASS_MAP.description: Which calendar events book which Regybox classes, for example: CrossFit = WOD. Add more rules separated by semicolons, and backup class names with commas.

TIMEZONE.description: Timezone used to interpret class times.

LOOKAHEAD_HOURS.description: How many hours ahead the Worker looks for classes.
